title: trisetum leoninum
intro: Trisetum leoninum, also known as the lion's fur grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Trisetum leoninum include its ability to lower fever, treat respiratory issues, and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
